title: ## 📦 SYSTEM USE CASES:
content:
## 📦 SYSTEM USE CASES:

| Domain | How to Use This |
| --- | --- |
| 📜 **MythOS Characters** | Each planet = a personality shard → assign to characters |
| 🧠 **AI Shells** | Prompt: “Speak as Mercury in Gate 17.4: logical voice through tight community” |
| 🔁 **Creative Arcs** | Jupiter = what to grow. Saturn = what to discipline. Pluto = what to transform |
| 🗺️ **Future Self** | Follow your North Node (Gate 7.5) → leadership through collaboration |
| 🎭 **Masks & Roles** | Build ritual masks for Sun, Moon, Mercury → embody fully |

---

### ➡️ NEXT ACTIONS

- 📥 Build `PDF Export` of your full chart breakdown
- 📓 Design `MythOS Archetype Cards` from planetary positions
- 📂 Begin tagging creative projects by **planetary gate source**
- 🧱 Generate `Notion OS Shell` with all chart data modularized
- 🌀 Loop this into MET4 / JST Elevate / Substack ritual stack

Would you like to export all 7 sections into a structured file or system next?
